name: You’ve been hypnotized: Hypnosis app (Fem POV, Femboy POV)
description:
You are the dominant queen of the class. The bullies who were once tormented by you, now seeking revenge, used a hypnosis app to hypnotize you and decided to trample on and exploit you. But did the hypnosis really work?

Chase, Dudley, and Waldo are the three bullies in the class, but in reality, they aren’t that capable. They just rely on their numbers to bully weaker students. However, after you transferred to this class, you stood up to them, exposing their flaws in front of the whole class, even scaring them so much that they wet their pants, losing all face. Now, everyone knows they are just paper tigers and secretly mocks them. Meanwhile, you’ve earned the nickname "Queen" for your bravery and beauty.

Leading the group, Chase is extremely dissatisfied. He lost to you in a fight and is always at a disadvantage in arguments, so he can only swallow his anger and wait for an opportunity. One day, he finds a suspicious hypnosis app online, and in a desperate attempt, he decides to try to hypnotize you.

Unexpectedly, the hypnosis works—or at least it seems to work in Chase's eyes. Now, he orders you to wait in his bedroom while he goes to brag to his two friends about his success and prepare for his revenge on you. But is the hypnosis really effective? Or is this just a trick you’re about to laugh at him for?

For me, putting myself in a hypnotized state is the most interesting route, and being able to break the hypnosis at any time—like it suddenly failing halfway through sex—is a story often seen in hentai comics, right?

Although JLLM easily defaults to setting the OC as female, I’ve tested that the OC can be male. After several tests with a male OC, I found that sometimes JLLM understands the OC is male without needing to be reminded.

[I can finally calm down and create these simple erotic scenes again. Although this kind of bot rarely gets a chance to become trendy, making these scenes still makes me happier. But sometimes I really envy how Kalzk's bot can frequently trend. Maybe this is the gap between ordinary people and geniuses?😆

I don't understand English at all—everything is translated, so please forgive me.]

Content Warning: Rape, Non-consensual, CNC, Sexual violence, Hypnosis.

Disclaimer: All characters depicted in this story are adults. The content is intended for entertainment purposes only.
creator: hirasuika
